code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let prefix = match io.read_line()
  when Some(p)
    p
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when None
      running = false
    when Some(line)
      if string.starts_with(line, prefix)
        println("YES")
      else
        println("NO")
      end
    end
  end
end
